reviews.comment:
Como todo full de YPF, cuenta con los servicios necesarios, sólo que para donde se encuentra ubicado, la ambientación podría estar algo mas iluminada y cuidada. El capuccino es riquísimo!

(Translated by Google)
Like any YPF full-service station, it has the necessary amenities, but given its location, the ambiance could be a bit brighter and more presentable. The cappuccino is delicious!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnck1HV2pRRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The light mechanical, lubrication and washing workshop, run by Fernando, is a pleasure to behold for its work, attention and friendliness.
